Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Paul Kingsley To Requests For Admissions, Set No. One, Form Interrogatory 17.1, Request To Admit Document Is Genuine, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jeane Struck, Esq. of Severson & Werson, Tel. 415.677.5508, for defendant and moving party;
Jonathan E. Davis, Esq. of The Arns Law Firm, Tel. 415.495.7800, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. At the hearing, plaintiff's counsel provided the Court with a copy of the dismissal as to defendant Comfort Dynamics only. Therefore, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and DEFENDANT COMFORT DYNAMICS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff Paul Kingsley To Requests For Admissions, Set No. One, Form Interrogatory 17.1, Request To Admit Document Is Genuine, And Request For Sanctions is ordered off calendar.
